en: Then Eliashib the high priest rose up with his brothers the priests, and they built the Sheep Gate. They consecrated it and set its doors. They consecrated it as far as the Tower of the Hundred, as far as the Tower of Hananel.
zh: 那時，大祭司以利亞實起來，和他一起作祭司的眾兄弟都起來，重建了羊門；他們裝上門扇，就把它分別為聖，又建造城牆，直到哈米亞城樓和哈楠業城樓，把城分別為聖；

en: And next to him the men of Jericho built. And next to them Zaccur the son of Imri built.
zh: 接著的一段由耶利哥人建造；再接著的一段由音利的兒子撒刻建造。

en: The sons of Hassenaah built the Fish Gate. They laid its beams and set its doors, its bolts, and its bars.
zh: 哈西拿的子孫建造魚門，他們安置橫梁，裝上門扇、門插和門閂。

en: And next to them Meremoth the son of Uriah, son of Hakkoz repaired. And next to them Meshullam the son of Berechiah, son of Meshezabel repaired. And next to them Zadok the son of Baana repaired.
zh: 接著的一段由哈哥斯的孫子、烏利亞的兒子米利末修築；再接著的一段由米示薩別的孫子、比利迦的兒子米書蘭修築；再接著的一段由巴拿的兒子撒督修築。

en: And next to them the Tekoites repaired, but their nobles would not stoop to serve their Lord.
zh: 接著這一段的是由提哥亞人修築；但是他們的貴族不願肩負他們的主的工作。

en: Joiada the son of Paseah and Meshullam the son of Besodeiah repaired the Gate of Yeshanah. They laid its beams and set its doors, its bolts, and its bars.
zh: 巴西亞的兒子耶何耶大和比所玳的兒子米書蘭修築古門；他們安置橫梁，裝上門扇、門插和門閂。

en: And next to them repaired Melatiah the Gibeonite and Jadon the Meronothite, the men of Gibeon and of Mizpah, the seat of the governor of the province Beyond the River.
zh: 接著的一段由基遍人米拉提、米崙人雅頓、基遍人和河西那邊省長所管轄的米斯巴人修築。

en: Next to them Uzziel the son of Harhaiah, goldsmiths, repaired. Next to him Hananiah, one of the perfumers, repaired, and they restored Jerusalem as far as the Broad Wall.
zh: 再接著的一段由金匠哈海雅的兒子烏薛修築。接著這一段的是由作香料的哈拿尼雅修築。他們修葺耶路撒冷的城牆，直到寬牆。

en: Next to them Rephaiah the son of Hur, ruler of half the district of Jerusalem, repaired.
zh: 接著的一段由管理半個耶路撒冷的區長，戶珥的兒子利法雅修築。

en: Next to them Jedaiah the son of Harumaph repaired opposite his house. And next to him Hattush the son of Hashabneiah repaired.
zh: 再接著的一段由哈路抹的兒子耶大雅修築，就是他自己房屋對面的那段。接著這一段的是由哈沙尼的兒子哈突修築。

en: Malchijah the son of Harim and Hasshub the son of Pahath-moab repaired another section and the Tower of the Ovens.
zh: 哈琳的兒子瑪基雅和巴哈．摩押的兒子哈述修築另一段城牆和爐樓。

en: Next to him Shallum the son of Hallohesh, ruler of half the district of Jerusalem, repaired, he and his daughters.
zh: 接著的一段由管理半個耶路撒冷的區長哈羅黑的兒子沙龍和他的女兒們修築。

en: Hanun and the inhabitants of Zanoah repaired the Valley Gate. They rebuilt it and set its doors, its bolts, and its bars, and repaired a thousand cubits of the wall, as far as the Dung Gate.
zh: 哈嫩和撒挪亞城的居民修築谷門。他們重建那門，裝上門扇、門插和門閂；又修築城牆四百四十公尺，直至糞門。

en: Malchijah the son of Rechab, ruler of the district of Beth-haccherem, repaired the Dung Gate. He rebuilt it and set its doors, its bolts, and its bars.
zh: 糞門是由管理伯．哈基琳的區長，利甲的兒子瑪基雅修築；他重建那門，裝上門扇、門插和門閂。

en: And Shallum the son of Col-hozeh, ruler of the district of Mizpah, repaired the Fountain Gate. He rebuilt it and covered it and set its doors, its bolts, and its bars. And he built the wall of the Pool of Shelah of the king's garden, as far as the stairs that go down from the City of David.
zh: 管理米斯巴的區長各荷西的兒子沙崙修築泉門。他重建那門，加蓋門頂，裝上門扇、門插和門閂；又重建靠近王園的西羅亞池的城牆，直到從大衛城下來的臺階。

en: After him Nehemiah the son of Azbuk, ruler of half the district of Beth-zur, repaired to a point opposite the tombs of David, as far as the artificial pool, and as far as the house of the mighty men.
zh: 下一段由管理半個伯．夙的區長，押卜的兒子尼希米修築，直到大衛墓地的對面，又到人工池和勇士之家。

en: After him the Levites repaired: Rehum the son of Bani. Next to him Hashabiah, ruler of half the district of Keilah, repaired for his district.
zh: 再下一段由利未人巴尼的兒子利宏修築；接著的一段由管理半個基伊拉的區長哈沙比雅為他本區修築。

en: After him their brothers repaired: Bavvai the son of Henadad, ruler of half the district of Keilah.
zh: 下一段由他們的兄弟，管理另一半基伊拉的區長，希拿達的兒子賓內 修築。

en: Next to him Ezer the son of Jeshua, ruler of Mizpah, repaired another section opposite the ascent to the armory at the buttress.
zh: 管理米斯巴的區長耶書亞的兒子以謝修築接著的一段，對著軍械庫的斜坡、城牆轉角的地方。

en: After him Baruch the son of Zabbai repaired another section from the buttress to the door of the house of Eliashib the high priest.
zh: 下一段，就是薩拜的兒子巴錄竭力修築的另一段，從城牆轉角的地方，直到大祭司以利亞實住宅的門口。

en: After him Meremoth the son of Uriah, son of Hakkoz repaired another section from the door of the house of Eliashib to the end of the house of Eliashib.
zh: 再下一段，就是哈哥斯的孫子、烏利亞的兒子米利末修築的另一段，從以利亞實住宅的門口，直到以利亞實住宅的盡頭。

en: After him the priests, the men of the surrounding area, repaired.
zh: 這一段之後是由住在約旦河平原的祭司修築。

en: After them Benjamin and Hasshub repaired opposite their house. After them Azariah the son of Maaseiah, son of Ananiah repaired beside his own house.
zh: 下一段是由便雅憫和哈述，修築他們自己房屋對面的那段。再下一段由亞難尼的孫子、瑪西雅的兒子亞撒利雅，修築他自己的房屋旁邊的那段。

en: After him Binnui the son of Henadad repaired another section, from the house of Azariah to the buttress
zh: 這一段之後是希拿達的兒子賓內修築的另一段，從亞撒利雅的房屋，直到城牆的轉角，就是城角的地方。

en: and to the corner. Palal the son of Uzai repaired opposite the buttress and the tower projecting from the upper house of the king at the court of the guard. After him Pedaiah the son of Parosh
zh: 烏賽的兒子巴拉修築對著城牆的轉角的地方，以及王宮突出高聳的城樓靠近護衛院的一段。下一段由巴錄的兒子毘大雅修築。

en: and the temple servants living on Ophel repaired to a point opposite the Water Gate on the east and the projecting tower.
zh: 居住在俄斐勒的殿役，修築直到東面水門對面和突出的城樓那一段牆。

en: After him the Tekoites repaired another section opposite the great projecting tower as far as the wall of Ophel.
zh: 再下一段，就是由提哥亞人修築的另一段，從那突出來的大城樓對面，直到俄斐勒的城牆。

en: Above the Horse Gate the priests repaired, each one opposite his own house.
zh: 從馬門往上的一段，祭司們各人修築自己房屋對面的城牆。

en: After them Zadok the son of Immer repaired opposite his own house. After him Shemaiah the son of Shecaniah, the keeper of the East Gate, repaired.
zh: 下一段由音麥的兒子撒督修築自己房屋對面的那段。再下一段由看守東門示迦尼的兒子示瑪雅修築。

en: After him Hananiah the son of Shelemiah and Hanun the sixth son of Zalaph repaired another section. After him Meshullam the son of Berechiah repaired opposite his chamber.
zh: 這一段之後是由示利米雅的兒子哈拿尼雅和薩拉的第六子哈嫩修築的另一段，下一段就是比利迦的兒子米書蘭修築自己住宅對面的那一段。

en: After him Malchijah, one of the goldsmiths, repaired as far as the house of the temple servants and of the merchants, opposite the Muster Gate, and to the upper chamber of the corner.
zh: 再下一段由金匠瑪基雅修築，直到殿役和商人的房屋，對著哈米弗甲門，直到城的角樓。

en: And between the upper chamber of the corner and the Sheep Gate the goldsmiths and the merchants repaired.
zh: 金匠和商人修築城的角樓和羊門之間的那一段。
